name: recall_auditd_rules_maps_au
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 02.AU/: a script(1) capture of `auditctl -l` and `systemctl status auditd`. Audit record generation and the auditd rule set is AU-2 (Audit Events) and AU-12 (Audit Generation). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; auditd syscall-rule vocabulary ('-w /etc/passwd -p wa -k identity', '-a always,exit') has near-zero overlap with 'audit events' / 'audit generation'. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor AU-9 (protection of audit info) present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The information system generates audit records for the events the organization determines to be auditable.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Configure the audit subsystem to capture defined auditable events.
objectives.assessment_procedures: Examine the list of audited events.

objectives.text: The information system provides audit record generation capability for the auditable events at all information system components where audit capability is deployed.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Enable the audit daemon on all in-scope hosts.

objectives.text: The information system protects audit information from unauthorized access, modification, and deletion.

evidence.title: auditd rule set capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-08 09:00:00-0500
[root@app01 ~]# systemctl status auditd --no-pager
  auditd.service - Security Auditing Service
     Active: active (running) since Mon 2026-03-02 06:14:55 EST
[root@app01 ~]# auditctl -l
-w /etc/passwd -p wa -k identity
-w /etc/shadow -p wa -k identity
-w /etc/sudoers -p wa -k scope
-a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S execve -k exec
-a always,exit -F arch=b64 -S adjtimex -S settimeofday -k time-change
-w /var/log/lastlog -p wa -k logins
[root@app01 ~]# auditctl -s
enabled 2
failure 1
backlog_limit 8192
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-08 09:01:33-0500
